linkedin.text:
You don't need a finished plan. You need 30 minutes with someone who's produced this 200+ times.

Most teams stall on the first step — destination undecided, budget unclear, no idea what's actually realistic.

One free 30-minute call fixes that. We'll:
• Pressure-test your destination shortlist
• Ballpark your budget per head
• Flag the dates that quietly save you money
• Tell you honestly what's doable

No pitch deck. No obligation. Just clarity you can take straight back to your boss.

Comment "CALL" or book your free 30-min planning call — slots this week are limited.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

facebook.text:
Honest truth: most teams overthink the first step of planning an incentive trip. 🧭

They wait until they have a destination, a budget and a perfect plan before they'll even ask a question. So nothing moves.

You don't need any of that yet. You need 30 free minutes with a partner who's produced 200+ of these.

We'll pressure-test your ideas, ballpark the budget per head, flag the money-saving dates, and tell you honestly what's realistic — no pitch, no obligation.

That's worth half an hour of anyone's week.

Send us a message and we'll find a slot.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #MICE #EventStrategy
